home.headline: Computer science student - Future software engineer
home.introduction: My name is Anthony Rolland. I am 21 years old and currently studying in the engineering cycle at INSA Hauts-de-France with a focus on computer science and cybersecurity.
home.summary: I am passionate about new technologies, especially software. This portfolio showcases my skills, academic path, and personal projects built to keep improving.
